items.name: MDN Web Docs
items.description: Comprehensive resource for web developers, offering documentation on HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and more.

items.name: Can I Use
items.description: Helps you check browser support for various web technologies and features.

items.name: CodePen
items.description: An online code editor and learning environment for front-end developers to showcase their work.

items.name: CSS-Tricks
items.description: A website dedicated to teaching CSS and web design techniques through articles, videos, and tutorials.

items.name: Font Awesome
items.description: A popular icon set and toolkit for adding vector icons and social logos to web projects.

items.name: freeCodeCamp
items.description: A nonprofit organization that provides free coding education and certifications in web development.

items.name: Stack Overflow
items.description: A community-driven question-and-answer website for developers to learn and share programming knowledge.

items.name: Tailwind CSS
items.description: A utility-first CSS framework for creating custom designs without writing custom CSS.

items.name: Bootstrap
items.description: The most popular HTML, CSS, and JS library for developing responsive, mobile-first projects on the web.

items.name: W3Schools
items.description: A web developer's site for learning HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, Python, and more.

items.name: Sass
items.description: An extension of CSS that allows you to use variables, nested rules, and functions in your stylesheets.

items.name: jQuery
items.description: A fast, small, and feature-rich JavaScript library that simplifies event handling, animations, and AJAX.

items.name: Vue.js
items.description: A progressive JavaScript framework for building user interfaces and single-page applications.

items.name: React
items.description: A JavaScript library for building fast and interactive user interfaces with reusable components.

items.name: Angular
items.description: A platform and framework for building client-side applications in HTML and TypeScript.

items.name: Webpack
items.description: A powerful JavaScript module bundler for modern web applications.

items.name: Lodash
items.description: A modern JavaScript utility library that provides modularity, performance, and extra functionalities.

items.name: NPM
items.description: A package manager for JavaScript, providing access to thousands of libraries and tools.

items.name: Parcel
items.description: A fast, zero-configuration web application bundler for JavaScript and TypeScript projects.

items.name: PostCSS
items.description: A tool for transforming CSS with plugins that allow you to use modern features.

items.name: Emmet
items.description: A plug-in for text editors that enables high-speed coding and editing for web developers.

items.name: Babel
items.description: A JavaScript compiler that transforms next-generation JavaScript into a version that is compatible with older browsers.

items.name: TypeScript
items.description: A typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript, improving development experience.

items.name: Next.js
items.description: A React framework that enables hybrid static and server-side rendering, optimized for SEO.

items.name: Gatsby
items.description: A React-based static site generator for building fast, modern websites with a focus on performance.

items.name: Eleventy
items.description: A simpler static site generator for building flexible websites using templates and data files.

items.name: GreenSock (GSAP)
items.description: An animation library for creating high-performance animations for web interfaces.

items.name: Framer Motion
items.description: A React library that enables smooth animations and gestures for creating interactive experiences.

items.name: Three.js
items.description: A JavaScript library for creating and displaying animated 3D graphics in the web browser.

items.name: PixiJS
items.description: A 2D rendering engine that makes creating rich, interactive graphics and games easy.

items.name: Modernizr
items.description: A JavaScript library that detects HTML5 and CSS3 features in the user's browser.

items.name: Moment.js
items.description: A popular library for parsing, validating, and displaying dates and times in JavaScript.

items.name: D3.js
items.description: A JavaScript library for creating data visualizations and charts using SVG, Canvas, and HTML.

items.name: Anime.js
items.description: A lightweight animation library for creating smooth animations in JavaScript.

items.description: A platform offering open-source illustrations for use in projects without copyright issues.

items.description: A community where designers share their work and find inspiration.

items.description: An online platform to showcase and discover creative work in various design disciplines.

items.description: A platform that recognizes and showcases the best web design projects worldwide.

items.description: A publication for web designers and developers, offering articles, guides, and tutorials.

items.description: A site providing web design tutorials, demos, and resources for creative developers.

items.description: A platform offering daily design resources for UI designers.

items.description: A free library of web fonts for use in websites and digital projects.
